'''Vaufthau Shipyards Ltd.''', in cooperation with [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]], was the manufacturer of the [[Invincible-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser|''Invincible''-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser]].

By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Vaufthau shipyards had been incorporated into the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] conglomerate.<ref name="TEGtW" />
